title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BANTAY-BATAC IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATAC, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARRIO NALUPTA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 18470 / 66 OG No. 17, 4229 (April 27, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6073, August 04, 1969 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BANTAY-BATAC IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATAC, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARRIO NALUPTA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

The name of Barrio Bantay-Batac in the Municipality of Batac, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby changed to Barrio Nalupta.

SEC. 2

. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved. August 4, 1969.
